quiz.question:
Black goes to e7 with the king. 

Who is better and why?

answers.text: White is better because of better pieces and structure, with a slight material edge.

feedback.text: The c6-bishop isn't that good. Black has some weak pawns on d5 and f5. The knights are generally better than Black's minor pieces.

distractors.text: Black is better because their king is active.

feedback.text: King activity isn't relevant at this point. The king on e7 is just slightly more advanced than White's, nothing to write home about.

distractors.text: This position is equal in material and activity.

feedback.text: Are you sure? White seems to be a pawn up, but that isn't the most relevant factor. What about piece quality/activity?
